ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate for the age group and gender */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the age group, year, and gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_group_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_group_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year value */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertility rate record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Fertility rate value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the gender is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Score indicating the accuracy of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES demographics ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_counts" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population count record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "count_value" INTEGER /* Population count value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)
